review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "You are a read-only code reviewer with no tools. Review only the provided diff. Never say you need to inspect files or run commands. Output the final verdict in the requested structure." --output-format json < /tmp/cp00-074-review-prompt.txt > /tmp/cp00-074-claude-review-output.json

findings.title: Descriptive mirror lists in contract definition were not programmatically tied to JS policy
findings.details: Claude noted that the CP00-074 contract definition mirrors policy-owned lists such as result_fields, required_input_fields, acceptance_gate_ids, and forbidden_boundary_suite_claims, and recommended a structural equality assertion to prevent future drift.
findings.recommendation: Add a structural equality assertion comparing the contract definition lists to CONTROL_PLANE_PERMISSION_AUDIT_BINDING_INTERACTION_PROOF_POLICY.

residual_risks: Low. CP00-074 is metadata-only and forward-looking; runtime permission evaluation, AuthZ evaluator calls, security trimming execution, audit event writes, review queue writes, fixture/test execution, database/storage/idempotency/lock/product-state writes, and LDIP implementation remain explicitly prohibited.
The only review finding was non-blocking contract drift hardening and was fixed before closeout.
parsed_review.overall_summary: CP00-074 ControlPlanePermissionAuditBindingInteractionProof covers the planned 10 Risk-A units RP00.P06.M05.S10-S19, consumes the CP00-073 initial matrix boundary, binds deny-over-allow, legal hold, ethical wall, object ACL, review route, approval route, security trimming proof, audit event expectation, permission fixture, and allowed test metadata, and preserves no-write/fail-closed/LDIP-planning-only boundaries.

raw_result.result_excerpt: Verdict APPROVE. P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=1. Blocking findings none. Required fixes none.
